message:
fix(vendored): gate mux_pool cx usage behind asupersync-runtime feature

mux_pool.rs unconditionally imported crate::cx which is only available
with the asupersync-runtime feature, causing E0432/E0599/E0282 when
building with just --features vendored.

- Gate cx imports and _with_cx methods behind cfg(asupersync-runtime)
- Add acquire_client_inner and execute_with_recovery_inner non-cx fallbacks
- Convenience methods now delegate through execute_with_recovery which
  routes to the cx or inner variant based on feature flags
- All public API behavior and wire protocol unchanged

Validated: cargo check/clippy clean for default, vendored, and
subprocess-bridge features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
